endpoint_attachment_id.description: Unique identifier for the Apigee endpoint attachment, required for associating the attachment with a specific Apigee instance.

location.description: Specifies the region where the endpoint attachment will be created; must match the region of the associated Apigee environment.

org_id.description: Specifies the Apigee organization ID to associate with the endpoint attachment; must be a valid and existing organization.

service_attachment.description: The name of the service attachment in the consumer project used to connect to the Apigee endpoint; must be a valid service attachment resource identifier.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeouts for creating, updating, and deleting the endpoint attachment, allowing control over operation duration.
